devdoc.details: Based on DelayedWETH's delayed withdrawal mechanism

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions anymore. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby removing any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params._recipient: Address to receive the slashed tokens

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

devdoc.title: LockingPool

InvalidGameStatus().notice: Thrown when attempting to set an anchor state using an invalid game result.

UnregisteredGame().notice: Thrown when attempting to set an anchor state using an unregistered game.

LockPeriodUpdated(uint256,uint256).notice: Emitted when lock period is updated

SlashRatioUpdated(uint256,uint256).notice: Emitted when slash ratio is updated

Unlock(address,uint256).notice: Emitted when a withdrawal is requested

getWithdrawalRequest(address).notice: Gets the withdrawal request details for a user

lockPeriod().notice: The withdrawal delay period in seconds

slash(address).notice: Slashes a percentage of tokens from the pool

token().notice: The token being locked in the pool

userdoc.notice: A locking pool contract that allows users to lock tokens with a delayed withdrawal mechanism
